title: Bar
description: A Bar with billards and music

title: Barnes & Noble
description: Get coffee, buy a puzzle and work together. Honestly the best first date idea if you both are into reading

title: Museum
description: Museum is the move if its too hot outside and both of you are artistic or into fantasy/Sci-Fi

title: Farmers Market
description: This is a nice stroll and a great ice breaker if one of you can lead/yap

title: Picnic
description: High effort but worth it. Bring games, snacks, drinks, a blanket, and positivity

title: Botanical Garden
description: Easy walk, pretty scenery, and plenty to talk about without the pressure of sitting face to face the whole time

title: Coffee Walk
description: Grab coffee then walk around a nice neighborhood, park, or downtown area. Simple but actually good for talking

title: Food Truck Crawl
description: Try a few random spots and rate everything together. Low commitment but fun if you both like food

title: Zoo
description: Always a good time with and a perfect ice breaker, talk shit about the animals

title: Hiking
description: Only if you're in shape else its going to be a long day

title: Thrifting
description: Great for people who are into vintage fashion and unique finds

title: Escape Room
description: Perfect for the over-achievers and overthinkers

title: Aquarium
description: Just like museum but for people who are more into animals than art

title: Mini Golf
description: As casual as it gets. Perfect for people who are competitive but lack hand eye coordination

title: Arcade
description: For the retro lovers but also for the alcoholics. Another great ice breaker for people who lack hobbies

title: Outdoor Pickleball
description: For people who already know how to play or actually want to learn. If you drink matcha, chances are you will be good at this sport

title: Indoor Pickleball
description: For people who already know how to play or actually want to learn. If you drink matcha, chances are you will be good at this sport

title: Tennis
description: ..if both of you play sports and have some hand eye coordination. Also great if you both suck at it and can laugh at yourselves

title: Fishing
description: .. but only if shes really into you and you know how to fish. Shes your number one fan and you like her company

title: Bouldering
description: For the adventure seekers and gym rats

title: Rollerblading Ice Skating
description: For the people who aren't scared to live freely

title: Indoor Driving Range
description: Great way to enjoy the weather, be outdoors, and have fun. Do not recommend if you're scared of embarrassment (you're no fun)

title: Outdoor Driving Range
description: Great way to enjoy the weather, be outdoors, and have fun. Do not recommend if you're scared of embarrassment (you're no fun)

title: Shooting Range
description: Great ice breaker, and gets the adrenaline going. One of you needs to be experienced

title: Bowling
description: Low energy, great for roasting and yapping but also for the vibes

title: Cooking Class
description: For the people who are both really shy or socially awkward but want to learn to be more adventurous

title: Dancing Class
description: Only if you both suck at dancing but love music. Or both of you like music and are into each other. Its intimate

title: Painting
description: This is fun in general. Doesn't require much experience and its a great ice breaker. Perfect to combo this with drinks or picnics etc.

title: Ceramic Class
description: It requires a lot of patience and is a bit more advanced than painting. But if you both are artsy, this is a great date idea

title: Cook Dinner
description: Put a movie on, make dinner, drink wine, and just relax and socialize

title: Ikea Run
description: If its too hot to walk outside then go on an Ikea run! Plenty of things to talk about, check out each others style

title: Movies
description: Good for 2nd or third date minimum. Not a great first date idea. Pick a random movie to make it interesting

title: Concerts
description: Pick a random artist/genre and just go in blind to make things more interesting

title: Raves
description: Only works if you go to a local set and both are open minded about music and love to dance

title: Trivia Night
description: Perfect if you want something social without it feeling too intense. Bonus points if you both are confidently wrong

title: Carnivals
description: Requires very little planning but a lot of money. If your idea of a vacation is relaxing then this is perfect

title: Beach Day
description: Pack snacks, bring towels, walk around, and hang out by the water. Works best when you can make a whole afternoon out of it

title: Lunch - Dinner
description: Great for catching up but also spending time with each other, especially if the spark is dying

title: Comedy Show
description: Great if you both have a similar sense of humor. Also gives you something easy to talk about after

title: Library
description: Library is a perfect place if you both need to get work done or some light reading but are tired of being home

title: Jigsaw Puzzles
description: Jigsaw Puzzles are a must. Throw a movie or music on in the background and just catch up

title: Board Games
description: This is a great way to challenge each other and there are so many board game options to choose from. Great for people who are competitive or are still getting to know each other

title: Renaissance Faire
description: Is a such a unique experience great for all types of people

title: Travel - road-trip
description: Cruise, out-of-state, national parks, etc.

title: DIY Projects
description: DIY Projects are a great way to stay creative and have fun together

title: Anime Convention
description: Dress up even if you're not into anime. Like halloween but better

title: Amtrak Trip
description: A great way to see the country and spend QUALITY time together

title: Volunteer Together
description: A meaningful date if you both care about the same causes. Also shows a lot about someone's character

title: Weekend Cabin Stay
description: Cook, watch movies, go for walks, and fully reset together. Definitely more of a long-term relationship move
